問題 1 を表示中

Full Story

In the living room, the girl was showing her parents an advertisement for a smartphone for kids. The next weekend, her parents were at a cell phone store. Her father was thinking that his daughter would be happy if she got a smartphone. And her mother was listening to a sales clerk explaining how to use the smartphone. The following week, the girl used her smartphone to call her father. And she asked him to pick her up from the dance studio. At a parent-teacher meeting, the teacher told the parents that some students were playing with their smartphones during class. And her parents looked concerned.
